content.problemStatement: You are given an array $Arr$ and an integer $X$. You have to search the array $Arr$ and check if $X$ exists in $Arr$ or not, if yes print the first position of $X$ else print $-1$.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line contains two integers $N$ and $X$ - denoting the number of elements in $Arr$ and the number to search in the array.
- The second line contains $N$ integers.
content.outputFormat: Output the first index of $X$ in $Arr$ if it exists, else output $-1$.
